name: Viennese Beef Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 x Med Carrots, scraped and sliced
1 x Celery root, pared and cubed
3 x Sm Turnips, pared and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Take the white parts of the leek only and clean them. Thinly slice.
2. Scald bones and rinse in cold water. Place beef and water in a large kettle. Bring to a boil.
3. Add bones, salt, and pepper. Slowly bring to a full simmer. Remove any scum from the top.
4. Cook over low heat, partially covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
5. Again remove any scum from the top.
6. Add remaining ingredients and continue cooking about 40 minutes, until meat and vegetables are tender. Discard parsley, bay leaves, and bones.
7. Remove meat and cut into bite-sized pieces, discarding any gristle. Return meat to soup. Serves 8 to 10.
8. You may also add noodles, rice or dumplings to the finished soup.
